title: Tangy Moroccan Frittata
description: A flavorful and nutritious breakfast dish inspired by Moroccan cuisine, combining the tanginess of frittata with the richness of fromage blanc.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the bissara over medium heat until fragrant.
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs and season with salt and black pepper.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked bissara and cook until the eggs start to set.
Stir in the fromage blanc and cook for another minute.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the frittata is set and golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to loosen the edges of the frittata and carefully slide it onto a plate.
